sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Lost Money on Gartner, Inc. (IT)? Join Class Action Suit Seeking Recovery - Contact The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is encouraging shareholders of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements about its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets, leading to significant stock price declines on two separate occasions in 2025 and 2026. The deadline to seek lead plaintiff appointment is May 18, 2026.

feed.title: VICI Properties Q1 2026 Earnings Preview — April 30, Street Expects $0.71 EPS
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are projecting VICI Properties will report Q1 2026 earnings per share of $0.71 on revenue of $1.02 billion. This represents a significant 39.2% year-over-year EPS growth and a 3.6% revenue increase. Investors will be keenly watching tenant lease coverage ratios, acquisition pipeline commentary, and updated full-year AFFO guidance, as these factors will be critical for assessing the REIT's income stream sustainability and dividend outlook.

feed.title: Provident Financial Services (PFS) Q1 2026 Preview: EPS Est. $0.55, Reports April 30
feed.summary: Provident Financial Services (PFS) is expected to report Q1 2026 earnings of $0.55 per share on revenue of $225.2 million, according to Wall Street analysts. This forecast represents a 12.2% year-over-year EPS increase. The regional bank is set to release its results on April 30, with key investor focus on net interest margin, loan growth composition, credit quality, and deposit trends.

feed.title: T-Mobile Reinvents Business Internet from the Ground Up and the Sky Down with ‘SuperBroadband’
feed.summary: T-Mobile has launched SuperBroadband, a new business internet solution integrating its 5G Advanced network with Starlink Broadband. This offering provides ultimate redundancy, unmatched coverage across every U.S. ZIP code, and unprecedented simplicity through a single managed service. SuperBroadband aims to solve common business internet issues like inconsistent reliability and limited coverage, ensuring virtually unbreakable connectivity for businesses of all sizes.

feed.title: T-Mobile expands fiber in Northeast and Midwest, reaching 1M more homes
feed.summary: T-Mobile has announced two strategic fiber joint ventures to significantly expand its fiber-to-the-premises (FTTP) footprint, aiming to reach over 1 million additional homes across the Northeastern and Midwestern U.S. These JVs, one with Oak Hill Capital to integrate GoNetspeed and Greenlight Networks, and another with Wren House to acquire i3 Broadband, bolster T-Mobile's broadband portfolio alongside its 5G fixed wireless access offering. The transactions are expected to close in 2026 and 2027, with T-Mobile investing approximately $2.7 billion in total.

feed.title: Barrick picks New York for gold spinoff later this year
feed.summary: Barrick Mining Corp. plans to list its North American operations in New York with a secondary listing in Toronto, aiming to complete the IPO by year-end. This spinoff, potentially worth over US$60 billion, will separate its North American assets from operations in riskier jurisdictions and follows a period of declining output and management changes. The new entity will include Barrick's interests in joint ventures with Newmont Corp. in Nevada and the Dominican Republic.

feed.title: Alluvium and Adobe Partner to Advance Supply and Demand Intelligence for Health Systems
feed.summary: Alluvium and Adobe have partnered to create a joint solution for healthcare capacity management, combining Alluvium’s supply orchestration with Adobe’s demand generation capabilities. This collaboration aims to address inefficiencies caused by organizational silos and inadequate technology, offering core capabilities in strategic planning, patient access, and care engagement. The new offering is designed to bridge the gap between patient demand and provider capacity, ensuring more personalized experiences and effective care delivery.

feed.title: $50M round pairs Keysight with Liquid Instruments on AI test tools
feed.summary: Liquid Instruments, a developer of software-defined test solutions, has closed a $50 million Series C funding round co-led by Keysight Technologies and Australia's National Reconstruction Fund Corporation. In addition to the investment, Keysight will enter a commercial arrangement with Liquid Instruments to accelerate the development of AI-driven instrumentation. The funding will support product development, scaling of Liquid Instruments' AI-powered platform, and expansion into key sectors like aerospace, defense, and semiconductors.

feed.title: Olympics add first global banking partner as JPMorgan joins LA28
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase has become the Official Bank of Team USA and the LA28 Olympic and Paralympic Games, and a Founding Partner of the LA28 Games. This partnership marks JPMorgan Chase as the first Global Banking Partner in Olympic history. The initiative aims to support athletes, expand opportunities, and create a lasting legacy in Los Angeles and across the United States, including financial health workshops and a collaboration with NBCUniversal for multi-platform coverage.

feed.title: Wells Fargo cardholders can now move rewards points to Cathay Pacific
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has added Cathay Pacific as a new transfer partner for its Rewards Points Transfer program, allowing credit cardholders to convert their points to Cathay Pacific Asia Miles at a 1:1 ratio. This partnership significantly expands the geographic reach of Wells Fargo's travel network, especially in Asia, and offers cardholders more options for redeeming points for flights, upgrades, and companion tickets. This initiative aims to give customers greater flexibility and enhance their travel experiences.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Expands Plainville Facility With Flagship Bioprocess Design Center To Advance Biologics Development
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has opened its flagship U.S. Bioprocess Design Center (BDC) in Plainville, Massachusetts, to help customers accelerate the development and scaling of biologics, including vaccines and cell/gene therapies. This 4,000-square-foot facility provides advanced bioproduction capabilities, hands-on training, and technical consulting, integrating an end-to-end workflow to reduce time to market. The expansion reinforces Thermo Fisher's commitment as an innovation partner in the biopharmaceutical industry and leverages Massachusetts's strong life sciences sector.

feed.title: New Teledyne FLIR software detects drones with fewer than 4 pixels
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR OEM has launched Prism C-UAS, a high-performance counter-unmanned aircraft system (C-UAS) detection and tracking software. This new software utilizes patented thermal infrared image processing and AI to detect small, hard-to-detect drones with fewer than four pixels on target, significantly extending detection range and speeding up response time. Prism C-UAS is designed to address the increasing global threat of unauthorized drone activity near critical infrastructure, airports, and special events.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin stock (US7010941019): Is its diversification strategy strong enough to unlock new up
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin, a diversified leader in motion and control technologies, is well-positioned for industrial cycles due to its broad portfolio, strategic acquisitions, and focus on aerospace and industrial automation. The company leverages its business model of aftermarket services and a strong R&D pipeline to navigate economic fluctuations and capitalize on global sustainability trends and infrastructure spending. Despite potential risks from economic downturns and supply chain issues, analysts generally view Parker-Hannifin favorably for its resilience, growth potential, and long history of dividend increases.

feed.title: Is Ecolab (ECL) 4.7% Overvalued After Q1 2026? Adjusted EPS $1.7
feed.summary: Ecolab (ECL) reported strong Q1 2026 results with adjusted EPS of $1.70, beating estimates, and revenue of $4.1 billion, exceeding expectations. The company saw double-digit adjusted EPS growth and a 10% year-over-year increase in sales, driven by high-tech, life sciences, and pricing strategies. Despite these positive financial results, GuruFocus rated Ecolab as modestly overvalued by 4.7% based on its GF Value, though its fundamentals, profitability, and growth metrics remain strong with a GF Score of 87/100.

feed.title: Defense agencies can use Pitney Bowes cloud platform for sensitive shipping
feed.summary: Pitney Bowes has achieved Impact Level 4 (IL4) Provisional Authorization for its SendPro® 360 platform solutions, allowing U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) agencies and defense contractors to use the platform for secure shipping and mailing operations involving Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). This authorization validates that SendPro 360 meets stringent DoD cloud security requirements, enabling modernization of defense logistics with enhanced data protection and operational resilience. The company also holds Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) 1.0, FedRAMP, and GovRAMP authorizations, reinforcing its commitment to public sector compliance.

feed.title: Franklin Resources: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc. (BEN) reported fiscal second-quarter earnings of $268.2 million, or 49 cents per share, which adjusted to 71 cents per share, exceeding Wall Street expectations. The investment manager posted revenue of $2.29 billion. Franklin Resources shares have seen a 15% increase since the beginning of the year and a 47% rise over the last 12 months.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company exceeded Wall Street expectations in Q1 2026, reporting comparable earnings per share of $0.86 against estimates of $0.84, a 2.4% beat. The beverage giant's revenue reached $12.50 billion, a 12.0% increase from Q1 2025, driven by strong organic growth of 10.0%. Analysts maintain a bullish stance, with 20 buy ratings and 6 hold ratings, setting a positive tone for the summer selling season.

feed.title: Liquid Instruments Secures $50M | Business | Apr 2026
feed.summary: Liquid Instruments has successfully closed a $50 million Series C funding round, co-led by Keysight Technologies and the Australian Government’s National Reconstruction Fund Corporation. This investment will fuel product development, scale the company's AI-powered platform, and expand market presence in key sectors like aerospace, defense, and semiconductors. Keysight Technologies will also enter a commercial agreement with Liquid Instruments to accelerate AI-driven instrumentation.

feed.title: Invesco Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. (IVZ) reported its Q1 2026 financial results, with adjusted EPS of $0.57, missing the estimated $0.59. The company recorded total operating revenues of $1,744.5 million and net revenues of $1,264.3 million, achieving its 11th consecutive quarter of net inflows with $21.8 billion. Its total AUM reached $2,159.5 billion, contributing to an improved adjusted operating margin of 34.5%.

feed.title: Four companies sign Spain wind deal aimed at cutting 32,000 tons of CO2
feed.summary: PepsiCo, Givaudan, Smurfit Westrock, and Statkraft have signed a 10-year Virtual Power Purchase Agreement (VPPA) for a repowering wind asset in Spain. This agreement, orchestrated under PepsiCo's pep+ REnew program, aims to reduce approximately 32,000 metric tons of CO₂ emissions annually and represents the program's first European renewable electricity cohort. The initiative supports PepsiCo's updated 2030 climate goals and facilitates access to long-term renewable energy for its supply chain partners.

feed.title: RAD Amplify Expands Collaboration with World’s Largest Holding Company for Third Year, Accelerating AI-Powered Creator Strategy with Ketchum
feed.summary: RAD Amplify announced an expanded collaboration with Omnicom for the third consecutive year, focusing on AI-powered, audience-first creator strategy. This partnership, which includes work with Ketchum, aims to integrate audience intelligence earlier into creator strategies for sharper planning and stronger execution. The initiative uses RAD Amplify's proprietary AI-driven technology and RAD Score to translate audience behavior into actionable insights for more responsive and resonant campaigns.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America stock (US6951561022): Why does its containerboard dominance matter more now for U.S. investors?
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PCA) is a leading player in the U.S. packaging sector, specializing in containerboard and corrugated packaging. The company's vertically integrated model and focus on North American markets position it well to capitalize on increasing e-commerce demand and the shift towards sustainable packaging. PCA's stable operations serving essential industries like food and beverages provide consistent cash flow, making it an attractive option for investors seeking stability and dividend consistency in their portfolios.
